missables: Al Bhed Primer Vol. X — on the C-shaped western side path (Precipice). Point of no return: cannot return after proceeding to Djose Highroad.
Serene Armlet — in the small area below the western Yevon platform. Same point of no return.
Gate donations (Scout / Ice Lance / Moon Ring) — only available before Seymour grants entry to the road proper.

Gatta/Luzzu fate choice — the dialogue with Gatta inside the command center permanently determines who dies in Operation Mi'ihen. Speaking to Gatta twice and choosing the second option both times sends Luzzu to the front (Luzzu dies); any other choice results in Gatta dying. There is no way to change the outcome afterward.
All Mushroom Rock Road items — no return after the final machina ascent triggers the Operation.
sgTip: Operation Mi'ihen rewards 400 AP from Sinspawn Gui — take time in the aftermath to spend those spheres before heading to Djose. Kimahri can branch early toward Lancet nodes to start diversifying his path.

subLocations.name: Lower Road
subLocations.prose: The lower switchbacks of Mushroom Rock Road are lined with Crusaders handing out supplies — speak to every soldier you pass. At the gate before Seymour arrives, a guard on the left accepts donations: 100 gil yields a Scout, 1,000 gil an Ice Lance, and 10,000 gil Yuna's Moon Ring — make the donations before entering the road proper. Funguars, Garudas, and Basilisks are the enemies here; Garudas are flyers that only Wakka and magic can reliably hit. Shelinda is somewhere on the road and will heal the party for free if you're low. After the first elevator ride, check the alcove to the north (a chest plus an NPC). The path west off the main route holds the Serene Armlet: ride the Yevon platform down to the small area below and claim it. Further along the Precipice section, the C-shaped western detour path leads to Primer X at its far tip — this is a separate detour from the Serene Armlet. Save at the Save Sphere near Luzzu and Gatta before riding the machina to the top.

subLocations.name: Ridge / Command Center
subLocations.prose: At the top, a guard by the machina platform gives a Mega-Potion. Inside the command center, loot both chests flanking Lulu and Yuna before speaking to Maester Kinoc. After meeting Kinoc, speak to Gatta — this dialogue is irreversible and determines who dies in the battle: speak to Gatta twice and choose the second option both times to send Luzzu to the front (Luzzu dies); any other choice sends Gatta (Gatta dies). Ride the machina up and witness Operation Mi'ihen. After the battle, collect the Hi-Potion among the scattered bodies before speaking to any party members.

bosses.strategy: Start with Lulu, Wakka, and Yuna, exclusively targeting the head. When the head begins to move, counter the incoming attack with any long-range attack or spell — if you can't interrupt it, have Esuna ready for the deadly Venom poison. Save Overdrives and both of Yuna's aeons until the head is nearly dead, then use them to finish the head and damage other parts at the same time. After the head falls, bring in Auron and Kimahri to pound the body — take out any surviving arms first since they regenerate every third turn and protect the body. After the apparent defeat a second phase follows, but it's much weaker and Seymour fights alongside you; this is the only opportunity to see Seymour's Overdrive.
